name: Orange Lake Amandine
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute almonds in butter until golden brown, then set aside.
2. Season the fillets with salt, pepper, and thyme. Dip each fillet in milk, then dredge in flour.
3. Fry the fillets in hot oil over medium heat until golden brown on both sides. Drain on paper towels.
4. Remove the fillets to a serving dish. Sprinkle with almonds and parsley.
5. Garnish with lemon wedges, if desired.
